overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval town at night. The scene features cobblestone streets, half-timbered buildings, and torch-lit pathways as the character travels from a narrow stone walkway through the town center and out toward the outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway along church wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding a horse along a narrow elevated walkway beside a stone church wall with stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and stained glass windows
illuminated stained glass windows emitting warm orange light
low stone railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
burning torches mounted on walls providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow elevated stone walkway alongside a church wall with glowing stained glass windows. The horse trots forward on cobblestones, passing wall-mounted torches that cast flickering light against the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval town street with half-timbered buildings

events.description: exits the covered stone walkway and enters the open cobblestone street of the medieval town

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding through narrow town streets, navigating between medieval buildings

entered.detail: traditional half-timbered medieval buildings with wooden beams and plaster walls
wet cobblestone street reflecting the torchlight
tall stone tower with pointed roof visible in the distance
simple wooden benches placed along the building walls

segments.scene_description: The horse emerges from the walkway into a narrow cobblestone street lined with half-timbered medieval buildings. Warm light spills from windows and street torches as the rider proceeds toward a distant stone watchtower, passing wooden benches along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: town street with gathering of torch-bearing townspeople

events.description: encounters a group of townspeople in red robes carrying torches on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding past a group of townspeople gathered on the street, holding torches

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople in red robes holding torches, standing in a cluster on the roadside

entered.detail: wooden stairs leading up to building entrances

segments.scene_description: The rider continues through the town and passes a group of townspeople in red robes holding torches on the right. The street features wooden stairs leading to doorways, and the stone watchtower grows larger ahead as the horse maintains a steady pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone road leading out of town with stone archway and trees

events.description: road begins ascending uphill as the dense town buildings give way to more open surroundings
passes under a stone archway on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding uphill on a cobblestone road, leaving the town center behind

entered.detail: stone archway bridge crossing over the road
tall pine trees lining the road as the town thins out
simple wooden fence along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The road ascends uphill away from the dense town center, transitioning to a more open environment with pine trees lining the path. The rider passes a stone archway bridge on the left as the medieval buildings recede behind, continuing along the cobblestone road into the outskirts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit medieval town that gradually transitions from narrow stone corridors to the open outskirts. It begins on an elevated stone walkway beside a church with glowing stained glass, moving past flickering wall torches as the horse trots forward. As the path opens, the scene shifts into a narrow cobblestone street lined with half-timbered buildings and wooden benches, proceeding toward a distant stone watchtower. The rider then passes a group of torch-bearing townspeople in red robes and climbs wooden stairs, with the watchtower looming larger as the horse maintains its pace. Finally, the road ascends uphill and away from the dense town center, passing a stone archway bridge as the architecture recedes and the path opens into a pine-lined landscape.
